goal: Project Editor agent workspace at /project-editor + /project-editor/[project] in apps/planning-app: index lists registered projects with latest published generation chip, detail page renders ProjectTree (file browser via /api/dev/tree), forge-view iframe (latest preserved build via /api/dev/forge-view + /api/dev/forge-asset), and SSE-streamed agent launcher (/api/dev/spawn) with confirm dialog for claude-code/codex/gad-eval-run. Cross-links to /projects/edit/[id] (bestiary/BYOK) + /my-projects drawer. Middleware extends Clerk protection to /project-editor/* since spawn writes to disk.
